name: IR Quickstart
description: Triage kit for the first 60 minutes of an incident. Captures persistence baselines, current privacy grants, recent quarantined downloads, and browser activity, then runs the posture analyzer to surface unsigned persistence + unfamiliar team automation.

plugins.role: Persistence baseline: LaunchAgents + LaunchDaemons + StartupItems + BAM entries
Privacy permissions: what has been granted access to what
Recently quarantined downloads (LSQuarantine) for download-borne first-stage payloads
Browser history + downloads + extensions metadata (no page bodies)
Cross-reference persistence + permissions to surface unsigned/unfamiliar combinations
